nodes.name: Quebrada de los Cuervos
nodes.summary: Quebrada de los Cuervos是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Lesser yellow-headed vulture、橙頭黑鸝、Dark-throated seedeater等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Chestnut seedeater
nodes.summary: The chestnut seedeater (Sporophila cinnamomea) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay (where it can still be seen at the Quebrada de los Cuervos). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
